calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-08-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. Petitioner James Eleazer Hardaway was sworn and examined. Court grants decree changing petitioner's name to J. "James" Eleazer Hardaway. Decree signed in open court.
